questions.question: Which Union Ministry is associated with the ‘IndiaAI report’?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

answer.label: B
answer.text: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

questions.explanation: Seven different AI Working Groups within the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) have presented the inaugural IndiaAI report. This document will function as the blueprint that will steer the growth and evolution of India’s artificial intelligence landscape. Global India AI summit will be held on 10th December 2023.

questions.question: Which actor won the ‘Satyajit Ray Excellence in Film Lifetime Award’ of India?
questions.explanation: Information and Broadcasting Minister Anurag Thakur announced that Hollywood’s veteran star Michael Douglas will be conferred with the prestigious Satyajit Ray Excellence in Film Lifetime Award at IFFI (International Film Festival of India) Goa 2023. The International Film Festival of India 2023 will take place in Goa from November 20 to 28. The star last featured in Marvel Cinematic Universe’s Ant-Man and the Wasp.

questions.question: SAMPRITI-XI Military Exercise is held between India and which country?
questions.explanation: The 11th edition of the bilateral Military Exercise SAMPRITI-XI between India and Bangladesh has concluded. The exercise began at the Joint Training Node, Umroi in Meghalaya. This exercise, alternatingly organised by both countries, signifies strong bilateral defence cooperation initiatives.

questions.question: Oketz, which was seen in the news, is the Canine Unit of which country’s military?
questions.explanation: The Israeli canine unit ‘Oketz’ played a crucial role in the rescue of 200 lives and the neutralization of 10 Hamas terrorists. ‘ The Israeli canine unit ‘Oketz,’ which translates to “sting” in Hebrew, extensively trains its dogs, specializing them in various areas, including attack, search and rescue, explosive detection, and weapon location.

questions.question: Belt and Road Initiative (BRI) was initiated by which country?
questions.explanation: A global summit was hosted by China’s President Xi Jinping, to celebrate 10 years of his signature foreign and economic policy, the Belt and Road Initiative (BRI). Russian leader Vladimir Putin was given a grand welcome at the global summit in Beijing, as China and Russia deepen their solidarity. Putin was the guest of honour among leaders and officials from more than 130 countries.

questions.question: ‘Heartland Tripura’, which was seen in the news, is a scheme associated with which field?
questions.explanation: In an effort to promote the employability and skillsets of Tripura’s youth, a project named “Heartland Tripura” was officially launched. This initiative is a collaborative effort involving Deloitte India and the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) in Agartala. ‘Heartland Tripura’ aims to create fresh avenues for career advancement and personal development for undergraduate students, encompassing both engineering and non-engineering disciplines.

questions.question: Raghubar Das, the new Governor of Odisha, is the former Chief Minister of which state/UT?
questions.explanation: President Droupadi Murmu has designated Raghubar Das, the former Chief Minister of Jharkhand, as the new governor of Odisha. Raghubar Das is set to take over the position from Ganeshi Lal, a former Haryana Bhartiya Janta Party (BJP) president and minister, who had been serving as the governor of Odisha since May 2018.

questions.question: Which state/UT has introduced ‘Doubt Clearance Bot’ AI-based application?
questions.explanation: The Andhra Pradesh government is implementing a ‘Doubt Clearance Bot,’ an AI-based application developed by ConveGenius AI Solutions, to enable intelligent learning for students in state-run schools. This app will be available to students after regular school hours, assisting them in resolving queries related to subjects such as physics, chemistry, biology, mathematics, English, and TOEFL preparation.

questions.question: Indian Government has recently introduced a Standards and Labelling Programme for which products?
questions.explanation: The Indian Government has introduced a Standards and Labelling Programme for solar panels, which was inaugurated in New Delhi. This initiative is aimed at assisting citizens in making well-informed choices when buying and using solar photovoltaic modules, commonly referred to as solar panels.

questions.question: Indian Navy conducted ‘Exercise Prasthan 2023’ in which city?
questions.explanation: ‘Exercise Prasthan 2023’ was conducted by the Naval Officer-in-Charge, Andhra Pradesh, under the Eastern Naval Command, to ensure the security of offshore development areas in Kakinada. The exercise involved multiple organizations, including the Indian Navy, Coast Guard, oil operators, port authorities, and state agencies. Various scenarios, such as terrorist attacks and oil spills, were simulated to test the efficacy of security mechanisms.
